text:
/ci1 バーッカじゃないの？
そんな動きで、ラプラスの攻撃が
避けられるわけないじゃない！

/ci1 ちっ、面倒な相手だ……
動き回ってかき回すしかねえな

/ci1 What are you, stupid? You could never dodge
Laplace's attacks with moves like those!

/ci1 Tch, talk about a pain in the ass.
We'll have to stick to evasive maneuvers!
